sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_date (id Int32, event_date DateTime64(3, 'UTC')) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_date (id, event_date) VALUES (1, parseDateTime64BestEffortUSOrZero('12/31/2022 12:00 PM', 3));
UPDATE test_date SET event_date = parseDateTime64BestEffortUSOrZero('01/01/2023 12:00 AM', 3) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_date FROM test_date WHERE event_date = parseDateTime64BestEffortUSOrZero('02/29/2023', 3);
SELECT id, event_date FROM test_date WHERE event_date = parseDateTime64BestEffortUSOrZero('Invalid Date', 3);
